source: hand-written for Phase 3b smoke; replaced by OSU-NLP-Group/Online-Mind2Web in Phase 3c

tasks.instruction: Open the page and confirm the title contains the word 'Example'.
tasks.evaluation_criteria: Agent's final answer mentions 'Example' or 'example' from the page title.

tasks.instruction: Open the Wikipedia main page and report one of the 'On this day' or 'Did you know' headline items.
tasks.evaluation_criteria: Agent's final answer references a headline visible on the page (any wording).

tasks.instruction: Open the GitHub repository page for OSU-NLP-Group/Online-Mind2Web and report the description in the page header.
tasks.evaluation_criteria: Agent's final answer summarises the repo description (one sentence).
